subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q4 review | INIT-9933
body: Following yesterday's call, the persian effort in Canberra needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Frida Kahlo seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-9933. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: wine, coffee.
